name: Keyboard Tester
desc: Full-size interactive key detection with Windows and macOS layouts.

name: Dead Pixel Test
desc: Fullscreen color cycles to identify dead pixels and screen uniformity.

name: Microphone Test
desc: Record your voice for 30 seconds and playback to verify clarity.

name: Speaker & Stereo
desc: Test Left/Right channel separation and audio balance quality.

name: Webcam Diagnostic
desc: Check your camera resolution, focus, and sensor quality in real-time.

name: USB Monitor
desc: Monitor active USB connections and detect hardware changes.

name: Touchscreen Test
desc: Multi-touch detection, drawing accuracy, and zone coverage test.

name: Mouse & Touchpad
desc: Test all buttons, scroll wheel, polling rate (Hz), and double-clicks.

name: Gamepad Tester
desc: Check controller joysticks, trigger precision, and vibration.

name: Battery Status
desc: Analyze real-time charging status and battery health percentage.

name: Network & Speed
desc: Fetch public IP, ISP details, connection type, and ping latency.

name: GPU / WebGL Test
desc: Detect your graphics card renderer and test WebGL FPS performance.

name: Sensors & GPS
desc: Test GPS location accuracy, Gyroscope, and Device Accelerometer.

name: CPU Benchmark
desc: Detect hardware threads, RAM, and run a CPU performance test.
